mission.title: argo-rollouts: Istio integrated canary in multi-cluster setup
mission.description: Istio integrated canary in multi-cluster setup. Requested by 19+ users.

steps.title: Check current argo-rollouts deployment
steps.description:
Verify your argo-rollouts version and configuration:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n argo-rollouts -l app.kubernetes.io/name=argo-rollouts
helm list -n argo-rollouts 2>/dev/null || echo "Not installed via Helm"
```
This feature requires a working argo-rollouts installation.

steps.title: Review argo-rollouts configuration
steps.description:
Inspect the relevant argo-rollouts configuration:
```bash
kubectl get all -n argo-rollouts -l app.kubernetes.io/name=argo-rollouts
kubectl get configmap -n argo-rollouts -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=argo-rollouts
```
We (Salesforce) are using [Istio multicluster setup primary-remote](https://istio.io/latest/docs/setup/install/multicluster/primary-remote/).

steps.title: Apply the fix for Istio integrated canary in multi-cluster setup
steps.description:
This seems doable and not terribly difficult to implement.

For this to work:
1. We would introduce controller configuration to have credentials (e.g a kubeconfig) to external istio primary cluster
2. When configured with external primary clusters, the rollout controller would start additional
```yaml
spec:
  strategy:
    canary:
      trafficRouting:
        istio:
          cluster: istio-primary.cluster.local
```

steps.title: Verify the feature works
steps.description:
Test that the new capability is working as expected:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n argo-rollouts -l app.kubernetes.io/name=argo-rollouts
kubectl get events -n argo-rollouts --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10
```
Confirm the feature described in "Istio integrated canary in multi-cluster setup" is functioning correctly.

resolution.summary:
This seems doable and not terribly difficult to implement.

For this to work:
1. We would introduce controller configuration to have credentials (e.g a kubeconfig) to external istio primary cluster
2. When configured with external primary clusters, the rollout controller would start additional watches on VirtualServices and DestinationRules in these primary clusters
3.
codeSnippets:
spec:
  strategy:
    canary:
      trafficRouting:
        istio:
          cluster: istio-primary.cluster.local

prerequisites.description: A running Kubernetes cluster with argo-rollouts installed or the issue environment reproducible.
